title: pellionia falcata
intro: Pellionia falcata, also known as the cut-leaf pellionia or umbrella plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. Traditionally, it is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and is often used to treat conditions like asthma and bronchitis. Pellionia falcata can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used as a herbal tea.
